metadata.title: Circles 😵‍💫
metadata.summary: "Circles… same thing every day. No change, no wonder, no love for what you do—nothing new. You feel me?

metadata.title: Vive tu Vida 🌸
metadata.summary: "Is it really wrong to stand up for yourself and choose your own path, even when everyone around you has opinions about how you should live? If everyone sees life differently, should you follow their advice blindly, or experience things for yourself and shape your own reality? And at the end of it all, would you rather live safely within expectations—or take risks, be real, and avoid the regret of never trying?

metadata.title: Not Lonely, Just Learning
metadata.summary: What if being alone isn’t loneliness—but the beginning of discovering who you really are?

metadata.title: The Beauty of Imperfection
metadata.summary: "What if the very flaws you try to hide are the parts that make your story unforgettable?

metadata.title: Built Different (And Proud of It)
metadata.summary: Have you ever felt like you don’t fit in no matter how hard you try? Honestly, it ain’t easy choosing to be different, choosing to be kind, choosing to be honest when everyone else is doing the opposite. This piece is me talking about what it’s like to go through hate, isolation, and being misunderstood at school just because I stayed true to myself. It’s about the pain, the growth, and learning to stand alone without losing who I am. And in the end, it’s really just a message to anyone out there who feels different: don’t give up on yourself — your light matters.

metadata.title: When Effort Turned Into Exhaustion
metadata.summary: This piece explores the quiet fear of feeling like you’ve lost your intelligence and the frustration that follows when effort doesn’t bring results.

metadata.title: It’s Okay to Reflect
metadata.summary: At times, do you ever feel like isolating yourself from the world? Just taking a break and being you. When circumstances finally slap sense back into you, and all you want is to be alone.

metadata.title: Is It Really That Phone? Or Is It Something Deeper
metadata.summary: Maybe you feel the same way I do. You’re the type who wants to make a change—you plan to make a change—but somehow you fall back into the same cycle again. Scroll, scroll, scroll… and scroll. Afterwards, guilt eats you up, and you hate yourself for it. But honestly, is it really the phone—or is it something you’ve never fully understood?

metadata.title: I Don’t Know Anymore
metadata.summary: Have you ever been in that position where things feel so heavy? Where everything you've been working for seems to be crumbling down and it's all you by yourself, no one else? That feeling like your heart is about to pop off because it's too much to contain? That feeling of isolating yourself from the world? The feeling that you just wanna leave where you are and start a completely new chapter elsewhere? That feeling that as much you have someone around you you still feel so empty? You fee like it's just how it was before? No new changes?

metadata.title: Do You Still Feel Too Attached?
metadata.summary: Have you ever felt attached to someone so bad, and it seems you cant leave, let's talk more on that, shall we? ☺️

metadata.title: Feel Like Giving Up? You Aren’t Alone
metadata.summary: Does it feel like life is getting harder by the day, and the burden is too heavy to handle? You aren't alone. Let's talk more about it.

metadata.title: New Year, New me
metadata.summary: What or how are new year, new me resolutions really supposed to look like? Immediate and direct? or slow but progressive? Let's find out more 😁
